title: Amtech G0975 3pc Scraper Set
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains 1 x 3 pc scraper set

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: removing old paint, scraping adhesives, removing residues
